name: Knowledge API for hi2vi content agent
objective: Make the knowledge document API production-consumable by the hi2vi content agent: a reachable hosted endpoint (hosting proposed at DECOMP) with bearer auth, docs/hi2vi/ project-folder bootstrap, publish-on-write so agent-written docs (md file + DB row, /explain-style) land on main and GitHub Pages without operator action, and the existing read/search endpoints (hybrid search, get) exposed under the same auth so hi2vi can use accumulated knowledge for content creation
